fieldFilterDesc: Configure field filtering rules to control which fields are collected from clickstream events.
filterModeDesc: Choose how to filter fields from your clickstream data.
whitelistDesc: Only collect the specified fields. All other fields will be excluded.
blacklistDesc: Collect all fields except the specified ones.
fieldListDesc: Select the fields to include or exclude based on the filter mode.
bulkImportDescription: Enter field names separated by commas or new lines.
pipelineLevelDesc: This rule applies to all applications in this pipeline.
appLevelDesc: This rule overrides the pipeline-level rule for this application.
inheritedRuleDesc: This application is using the pipeline-level filter rule.
noRuleDesc: All fields will be collected by default.
deleteRuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this filter rule?
unsavedChangesDesc: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
whitelistWarning: Warning: Whitelist mode with no fields selected will only collect system required fields.

validation.fieldNameInvalid: Field name must start with a letter or underscore, and contain only letters, numbers, underscores, and dots.
validation.fieldNameDuplicate: This field already exists in the list.
